title: Project: Create MP
description: A Modpack for create and Project E Lovers
body:
Project: Create MP (1.20.1 Forge) is your one‑stop “Create +” modpack:
• Includes every major Create add-on—from jetpacks and sifting to treats, teleporters, and decorations.
• Explore magical dimensions: Deep Aether, The Aether: Redux, plus Dungeons & Taverns.
• Survival enriched: Farmer’s Delight, Botany Pots, backpacks, undying charms, and more.
• Stable & smooth: JEI, GPU‑memory leak fixes, config utilities, and performance tuning.

Dive into a pack that balances technical automation, exploration, and polished survival—perfect for solo players or co-op groups ready to engineer, decorate, and adventure together.
